title: Political rally in Paliganj draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Paliganj promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Paliganj assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
